title: Nivea Men Sensitive Shaving Foam, 200 Millilitre
features: Advanced shaving with ultra glide technology^For men with sensitive skin which is prone to irritation from shaving^Close and extra gentle shave^Helps protect against cuts and irritations^Skin compatibility dermatologically approved on men with sensitive skin
description: Product Description Nivea for men sensitive shaving gel is for men with sensitive skin which is prone to irritation after shaving. It has an extra gentle subtle fragrance formula with chamomile and vitamin care that is specially developed to soothe irritated and sensitive skin while shaving. Contains ultra glide technology for an advanced shave: effective razor glide close and extra gentle shave helps protect against cuts and irritation the result is the skin feels calm, supple and cared for. p Advanced shaving with ultra glide technology. For men with sensitive skin which is prone to irritation from shaving. Calms and protects. Fragrance-neutral. Effective razor glide. Close and extra gentle shave. Helps protect against cuts and irritations. Skin compatibility dermatologically approved on men with sensitive skin. Ingredients Aqua, TEA-Stearate, Isobutene, Laureth-23, Glycerin, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Hamamelis Virginiana Bark/Leaf Extract, Maltodextrin, Tocopheryl Acetate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, PEG-7M, Potassium Stearate, Butane, Propane, Piroctone Olamine, Linalool, Parfum Directions Use Shake well before use / keep can upright Massage directly on wet face For best results follow with NIVEA MEN Sensitive Post Shave Balm with 0% alcohol* *no Ethylalcohol Safety Warning Caution: Pressurised container. Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. 4% by mass of the contents are flammable. Keep out of the reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd., Birmingham, B37 7YS. See more
